text: On weekdays I get up at seven and I go to work at eight.
But on the weekend I have free time. What do you do?
Weekend
Go out
Meet friends
Stay home
Go for a walk
Watch a movie
Relax
Sleep in
I always relax on Sunday.
I usually sleep in on Saturday.
I sometimes go for a walk.
How often do you go out?
Hi, Gabriela. The weekend is here! What do you usually do on Saturday?
I usually sleep in, and then I go out and meet friends. And you?
I often go for a walk. How often do you watch a movie?
I always watch a movie on Saturday night. On Sunday I stay home.
Nice. Do you ever work on Sunday?
No, I never work on Sunday. I always relax. Have a great weekend!
On the weekend I usually go out.
I always watch a movie on Saturday.
I never work on Sunday.
On Sunday I stay home and relax.

Hi, I am Gabriela. Let me tell you about my weekend. On Saturday I usually sleep in, and then I relax at home in the morning. In the afternoon I often go out with my friends. We sometimes go for a walk in the park, or we meet for coffee. On Saturday night I always watch a movie at home. On Sunday I usually stay home and rest, because Monday is a busy day at the bank. I never work on Sunday. I love my quiet weekends. What do you do on the weekend?

Good afternoon, this is Daniel from the community club, with the weekend schedule. On Saturday morning we always open the pool at nine o'clock. In the afternoon there is a walk in the park for everyone who wants to join. On Saturday night we often show a movie in the big room. On Sunday the club is quiet, so it is a good day to relax, read, or meet your friends for coffee. We never close before six in the evening. Have a wonderful weekend, everyone.

On Saturday Gabriela usually sleeps in and relaxes at home. In the afternoon she often goes out with her friends. They sometimes go for a walk or meet for coffee. At night she always watches a movie. On Sunday she usually stays home and never works.
Weekend
Go out
Meet friends
Stay home
Go for a walk
Watch a movie
Relax
Sleep in
I always relax on Sunday.
I never work on the weekend.
How often do you go out?
On Saturday I go out with friends.
On Sunday I usually stay home.
On the weekend I usually go out.
I always watch a movie on Saturday.
On Sunday I stay home and relax.
I never work on Sunday.
